nameMeanings.name: Penrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Penrice (Anglicized form of Welsh Pen Rhys) or from either of two other places called Penrhys. All three are in Glamorgan.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Penrice was born in 1325, in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Penrice II, was 36 and his mother, Burga Berga Langton, was 36. He had at least 1 daughter with Joan De Braose. He died in 1367, at the age of 42.
